examples: The invention relates to the application of elaidic acid ethyl ester.
Archaean cell walls lack murein, and their lipids have ether links rather than ester links.
This complex reaction is characterized by a keto-enol tautomerism equilibrium and ester exchange reaction.
Torcetrapib aims to raise good cholesterol, or high-density lipoprotein, by blocking the cholesterol ester transfer protein.
Merck unveiled another kind of HDL-raiser, a drug to inhibit the cholesterol ester transfer protein (CETP).
